notify.title: Push notifications
notify.desc: Get alerts on this device for issues, trips awaiting approval, and flagged items — even when YeldnIN isn't open.
notify.blocked: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
notify.unsupported: This browser doesn't support push notifications.

search.title: Search
search.prompt: Type to search across the app.
xexp.closedMonth: This month is closed — expenses are locked.
xadm.fxHint: 1 unit of each currency = how many EGP, for this month. Converts foreign purchase costs.
xadm.sharesHint: Each XOONX staff member's share of the 25% staff pool. Must total 100% (or leave all at 0 for an equal split).
xadm.noStaff: No XOONX staff yet (member-tier users with XOONX access).
sla.title: Delivery SLA
sla.desc: Special-order delivery guarantees: order date + grace days. Injection always uses the longest grace; otherwise the supplier's SLA class applies. Expected delivery comes from the carrying trip.
common.deleteConfirm: Delete this item? It will be hidden but kept in records.
countries.title: Countries
countries.name: Country
notifyrules.title: Notifications
notifyrules.intro: Choose who gets notified for each event.
trip.denyConfirm: Cancel this trip? This can't be undone.
trip.autoShipNote: Starts shipping when the first purchase is placed.
trip.typesHint: Leave empty to use the traveler's allowed types.
xrep.closeConfirm: Close this month? Expenses get locked and the report is snapshotted. This can't be undone.
xrep.closeHint: This month has ended (7+ days ago) — you can close it.
xrep.missingFx: Some purchase costs use a currency with no FX rate this month — set the rates in Admin (costs are understated until then).
pimport.title: Import products
pimport.hint: Upload an .xlsx with a header row. Recognized columns: Name (required), Type, SKU, Weight (g), Size, Grade, URL, Notes. Rows without a name are skipped.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
pricer.deletePermanentConfirm: Permanently delete this calculation? This cannot be undone.
pricer.deletePermanentConfirm2: Are you sure? This erases the record and its photos forever.
pricer.purgeConfirm: Permanently delete ALL calculation history? This cannot be undone.
pricer.purgeConfirm2: Are you absolutely sure? Every record and photo will be erased.

exp.flagHint: Flag this transaction for clarification or discussion. Operations users will see the flag.

cs.archiveQuestionConfirm: Archive this criterion? Past evaluations keep their scores.
cs.valuesIntro: The score each answer earns, multiplied by the question weight. Editable per scope.
cs.noQuestionsForScope: No active criteria for this selection.
cs.notif.approvedEvaluatorBody: The evaluation you submitted ({ref}) has been approved.
cs.weightsEqualHint: leave all at 0 to weight types equally
cs.splitHint: How much Calls vs Performance count toward the monthly overall average.
cs.maxBonusHint: The full monthly bonus (EGP) an employee earns at the top tier.
cs.tiersHint: An overall average at or above a threshold earns that % of the max bonus — the highest matching tier wins.
cs.scoringNote: Call-type weights are shares within the Calls block; the Calls and Performance blocks combine into your overall average.
cs.err.editWindowOver: You can no longer edit this evaluation.

daytype.mappingDesc: Which duty is recorded when an employee works each kind of off-day.
duty.title: Duty days (worked non-working days / training)
leave.noEmployee: You don't have an employee record.
salary.title: Salary structure
salary.bulkDesc: Apply a fixed or percentage change to one component across a team — or everyone who has it.
salary.bulkConfirm: Apply this raise to “{component}” for {scope}? It updates every employee who has that component and can’t be undone.
pay.title: Payroll
pay.generateHint: Basic for the chosen month; bonuses from the previous month.
pay.negativeNote: Deductions exceed pay; net floored at zero.
pay.lockConfirm: Lock this payslip? It becomes final and can't be edited.
dash.generateAllHint: Drafts a payslip for every employee without a locked one.
an.title: Analytics
an.trendDesc: Net of locked payslips over the last 6 months.
an.byTeamDesc: Projected monthly earnings, summed per team.
users.name: Display name
users.passwordHint: Min 8 chars, with a letter, a digit, and a symbol.
users.adminTierNote: This user is an admin tier and has full access to every module regardless of the levels below.
users.cantEditOwnAccess: You can’t change your own access levels. Ask another admin.
teams.title: Teams
teams.name: Team name
pages.title: Pages
perm.title: Permissions
perm.intro: Set the minimum level required for each action in a module. Admins always have full access. Higher levels include everything below them.
perm.resetConfirm: Reset this module's permissions to their defaults?
workflow.title: Status Map
workflow.intro: Rename the lifecycle statuses, choose which steps each Sales view skips (carries the previous status forward), and tune the auto-advance timers. The workflow steps themselves are fixed in code.
workflow.resetConfirm: Reset the whole status map to its defaults?
